title: Spec frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter at the top of a spec's spec.md (harness mode, feature-development workflow).

id.description: Lowercase, hyphen-separated spec id. Must match the spec folder name.

project.description: The project id this spec belongs to. Must match the containing project folder.

status.description: Spec lifecycle from the closed set. 'accepted' satisfies the workflow's approved-spec gate; 'draft' does not authorize downstream steps.

schemaVersion.description: Optional semantic version of the spec frontmatter shape.

summary.description: Optional one- or two-sentence scope statement.

experienceInventory.description: Optional, machine-readable list of the surfaces this spec delivers. When present, the experience step must produce an accepted contract per surface, and the harness validator checks that coverage. A spec with no surfaces (pure logic/refactor) may omit it or leave it empty.

surface.description: Surface slug. Matches experience/<surface>.md and the plan/tasks surface group.
